TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR UNLESS A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE BY EXPRESS SERVICES OVERNIGHT IS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT. A HEARSAY PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE IS NOT COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED. THE PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE BY OVERNIGHT DELIVERY MUST BE SIGNED BY THE PERSON WHO COMPLIED WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF C.C.P. SECTION 1013(C). (610/BCHAN)
